name: Rijksmuseum
description: National museum focused on Dutch art and history, located at the north edge of Museumplein.

name: Van Gogh Museum
description: Museum dedicated to Vincent van Gogh, placed on the west side of Museumplein.

name: Stedelijk Museum Amsterdam
description: Modern and contemporary art museum anchoring the southwest side of Museumplein.

name: Royal Concertgebouw
description: Concert hall facing Museumplein, useful as a southern cultural anchor.

name: Vondelpark Entrance
description: Green western edge that gives the test walk a softer public-space transition.
